title: Neo TranslucencyFix
description: Enables translucency for HUD and GUIs in Minecraft's newer versions.
body:
## Fixes GUI and HUD translucency support in Minecraft

Allowing resource packs that contains semi-transparency to work properly.

> This issue been fixed in [24w33a](https://bugs.mojang.com/issues/?jql=project+%3D+MC+AND+fixVersion+%3D+24w33a), making this mod unnecessary on Minecraft versions above 1.21.2.


## This is an updated version of the [TranslucencyFix mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix)

Adding support for the newer Minecraft versions and NeoForge.

It has and will not have any extra features.


---

### Example Resourcepacks?

> - [AquaHUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aquahud) - The original creator's motivation to make the mod.
> - [Torch's Dark Aesthetics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torchsdarkaesthetics) - My incentive to update the mod.

### Compatibility?

> Should be compatible with anything, really. Maybe another mod that has a drawTexturedQuad mixin might conflict, but I've never seen it. Even works with [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) and [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), both of which also affect GUI related things.


### Requirements?

> No requirements besides the respective mod loader.


### Backport or Update?

> For 1.15.x to 1.20.x use [TranslucencyFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix).

> For 1.21.2+ you don't need the mod anymore, it was fixed.
